category_sources: source_facts.description says it is the GNU compiler collection for arm-none-eabi.
display_name_sources: Project id brew:arm-none-eabi-gcc and source_facts.name provide the formula display name.
docs_sources: Official GCC online documentation is hosted on gcc.gnu.org, matching the GNU project homepage in source_facts.homepage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies GCC for ARM embedded cross-compilation.
